uiux-judge.pass_guidance: Set passed=true only if the output is strong enough to be used as a benchmark-quality answer.

preamble: You are being benchmarked on a UI/UX skill.
shared_rules: Make reasonable assumptions from the provided context.
Do not output code or HTML unless the request explicitly asks for it.
Do not repeat sections or restart the answer.
Use the required headings exactly once and in order.
